task_completion.description: ISS (POISK) and ISS (NAUKA) are added to the SpaceStations module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ISS (POISK)' and 'ISS (NAUKA)' in the SpaceStations module's satellite list, radar, or map views.

task_completion.description: CSS (TIANHE), CSS (WENTIAN), and CSS (MENGTIAN) are added to the SpaceStations module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'CSS (TIANHE)', 'CSS (WENTIAN)', and 'CSS (MENGTIAN)' in the SpaceStations module's satellite list, radar, or map views.

task_completion.description: ISS (ZARYA) remains in the SpaceStations module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ISS (ZARYA)' still present in the SpaceStations module's satellite list, radar, or map views.

task_completion.description: Johnson Space Center ground station is added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Johnson Space Center' in the Ground Stations configuration window, list, or displayed on the map.

task_completion.description: Kennedy Space Center ground station is added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Kennedy Space Center' in the Ground Stations configuration window, list, or displayed on the map.

task_completion.description: GPredict is configured to display UTC time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'UTC' in the time display of the GPredict main window (e.g., in the module header or clock), or check if the Preferences -> General -> Time format is set to UTC.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GPredict GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application windows, such as 'Module options', 'Edit ground stations', or 'Preferences', rather than just a text editor modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Ground stations were properly added through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The ground stations should appear integrated into the GPredict interface (e.g., on the map or in the official list), not just typed into a terminal or text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands that directly write to GPredict's hidden configuration files (e.g., ~/.config/Gpredict/).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Satellites required in SpaceStations module: ISS (ZARYA) [25544], ISS (POISK) [36086], ISS (NAUKA) [49044], CSS (TIANHE) [48274], CSS (WENTIAN) [53239], CSS (MENGTIAN) [54216]. Ground Stations: Johnson Space Center (29.5502 N, 95.0970 W, 14m) and Kennedy Space Center (28.5729 N, 80.6490 W, 3m). Time format must be UTC.
